title: ABGH Delhi Junior Resident Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
organization: Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt. Hospital Delhi (ABGH Delhi)
short_info: Acharyashree Bhikshu Govt. Hospital Delhi (ABGH Delhi) has released an official notification for Walk-in Interview for 5 Junior Resident Posts. Eligible candidates can attend the Walk-in Interview on at the ABGH Delhi office with original documents and self-attested copies.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 30 years for General, 35 years for SC/ST, 33 years for OBC
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 30 years for General candidates. Age Relaxation: 35 years for SC/ST candidates, 33 years for OBC candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS Degree from a recognized university and must have completed internship on or before 02.06.2026.
qualification.details: MBBS Degree from a recognized university Completed internship on or before 02.06.2026 Valid DMC Registration Certificate Candidate has not completed one year of Junior Residency in any recognized institution including regular & Adhoc period. Candidates, who have completed internship earlier than two years on 02.06.2026, shall not be eligible.

salary_details.details: Pay level 10 (Rs.56100-177500) plus allowances as admissible under rules.
